en.title: Do not buy the chat log
en.lede: A transcript is not a dashboard, service history, inspection report, or recovery plan. If an agent changes a real repository, the team needs more than a confident answer.

items.title: The risk
items.body: The agent changes code and the reason disappears into a chat window.

items.title: The demand
items.body: A team needs to see which rules, context, checks, and limits governed the work.

items.title: The shift
items.body: TES keeps that operating record inside the repository instead of in memory or folklore.

es.title: No compres el chat log
es.lede: Una transcripcion no es panel, historial de servicio, inspeccion ni plan de recuperacion. Si un agente cambia un repositorio real, el equipo necesita mas que una respuesta confiada.

items.title: El riesgo
items.body: El agente cambia codigo y el motivo desaparece en una ventana de chat.

items.title: La exigencia
items.body: Un equipo necesita ver que reglas, contexto, checks y limites gobernaron el trabajo.

items.title: El cambio
items.body: TES conserva ese registro operativo dentro del repositorio, no en memoria ni folklore.

pt.title: Nao compre o chat log
pt.lede: Uma transcricao nao e painel, historico de servico, inspecao nem plano de recuperacao. Se um agente altera um repositorio real, a equipe precisa de mais que uma resposta confiante.

items.title: O risco
items.body: O agente muda codigo e o motivo desaparece em uma janela de chat.

items.title: A exigencia
items.body: A equipe precisa ver quais regras, contexto, checks e limites governaram o trabalho.

items.title: A virada
items.body: TES preserva esse registro operacional dentro do repositorio, nao na memoria nem no folklore.

en.title: What the system leaves behind
en.lede: The pitch is simple because the machinery is local: every useful part of the run has somewhere inspectable to land.

items.title: Service record
items.body: Retained evidence, changed-file inventory, gate results, and rollback guidance.

items.title: Dashboard
items.body: Statuses such as PASS, BLOCKED, DEGRADED, NEEDS_REVIEW, and recovered context.

items.title: Memory
items.body: Versioned Markdown under `docs/agents/**`, with Cortex recall as a derived access path.

items.title: Mantra Gate
items.body: Before permitted state-changing work, `[🍳 Flash-Fry]` is the visible marker while full evidence stays recorded and bypass can be detected.

items.title: Safety lane
items.body: No default push, publish, remote mutation, marketplace action, or ungoverned MCP writes.

es.title: Lo que el sistema deja atras
es.lede: La venta es simple porque la maquinaria es local: cada parte util de la ejecucion tiene un lugar inspeccionable donde quedar.

items.title: Registro de servicio
items.body: Evidencia retenida, inventario de archivos, resultados de gates y rollback.

items.title: Panel
items.body: Estados como PASS, BLOCKED, DEGRADED, NEEDS_REVIEW y contexto recuperado.

items.title: Memoria
items.body: Markdown versionado en `docs/agents/**`, con Cortex recall como acceso derivado.

items.title: Mantra Gate
items.body: Antes de trabajo autorizado que cambia estado, `[🍳 Flash-Fry]` es el marcador visible, retiene evidencia completa y permite detectar bypass.

items.title: Carril seguro
items.body: Sin push, publish, mutacion remota, marketplace o escrituras MCP no gobernadas.

en.title: Proof without theater
en.lede: A good seller shows the inspection report. TES keeps claims narrow enough to be trusted and explicit enough to be checked.

items: Retained v1 evidence shows up to **6x baseline disciplined behavior in scoped Claude CLI evals**.
Codex has scoped retained behavior evidence for the named run, backend, model, and instruction contract.
Cursor is structural/contract parity only. Cursor behavior certification is not claimed.
The repository currently keeps retained evidence reports under `docs/evidence/reports/**`; the page avoids fixed report counts that drift.

blocks.text: No universal model behavior, universal adapter parity, guaranteed ROI, risk-free autonomy, marketplace availability, live UI, or automatic or ungoverned MCP memory write is claimed.

es.title: Prueba sin teatro
es.lede: Un buen vendedor muestra el reporte de inspeccion. TES mantiene claims estrechos para que puedan confiarse y revisarse.

items: La evidencia v1 retenida muestra hasta **6x baseline disciplined behavior en evaluaciones Claude CLI acotadas**.
Codex tiene evidencia retenida acotada para el run, backend, modelo y contrato de instruccion nombrados.
Cursor es solo paridad estructural/contractual. No se afirma certificacion de comportamiento de Cursor.
El repositorio conserva reportes bajo `docs/evidence/reports/**`; la pagina evita conteos fijos que se desactualizan.

blocks.text: No se afirma comportamiento universal de modelos, paridad universal entre adapters, ROI garantizado, autonomia sin riesgo, marketplace, live UI o escritura MCP automatica o no gobernada.

pt.title: Prova sem teatro
pt.lede: Um bom vendedor mostra o relatorio de inspecao. TES mantem claims estreitos o bastante para serem confiaveis e verificaveis.

items: A evidencia v1 retida mostra ate **6x baseline disciplined behavior em evals Claude CLI escopados**.
Codex tem evidencia comportamental retida e escopada para o run, backend, modelo e contrato de instrucao nomeados.
Cursor e apenas paridade estrutural/contratual. Certificacao de comportamento do Cursor nao e afirmada.
O repositorio mantem relatorios retidos em `docs/evidence/reports/**`; a pagina evita contagens fixas que derivam.

blocks.text: Nao ha claim de comportamento universal de modelos, paridade universal entre adapters, ROI garantido, autonomia sem risco, marketplace, live UI ou escrita MCP automatica ou nao governada.

en.title: Now the trail can speak back
en.lede: `tes-tts` turns technical work into local, reviewable speech. With optional OmniVoice, TES can use a local cloned voice while keeping the provider outside the package and the runtime under ignored local state.

items.title: Voice stays optional
items.body: TES does not bundle OmniVoice or require cloud speech. Users opt in, install the provider locally, and keep reference audio, generated WAV files, model cache, and voice prompt cache outside Git.

items.title: Technical speech is prepared
items.body: TES prepares request-local spoken text before synthesis: secrets are redacted, code and commands remain text, paths become useful references, and mixed engineering terms stay protected.

items.title: Audio becomes evidence
items.body: Generated WAV files make long reads inspectable: pause, replay, compare, and diagnose whether a problem came from text preparation, chunking, playback, or provider pronunciation.

blocks.text: Use it when reading matters: design reviews, long audit notes, release closeouts, and technical prose that benefits from a human-quality local voice. Setup lives in [TES-TTS-OMNIVOICE.md](install/TES-TTS-OMNIVOICE.md) and the full user section lives in the [manual](install/USER-MANUAL.html#tts-en).

es.title: Ahora el rastro tambien puede hablar
es.lede: `tes-tts` convierte trabajo tecnico en habla local y revisable. Con OmniVoice opcional, TES puede usar una voz clonada local mientras mantiene el provider fuera del paquete y el runtime en estado local ignorado.

items.title: La voz sigue opcional
items.body: TES no incluye OmniVoice ni exige voz cloud. El usuario decide, instala el provider localmente y mantiene audio de referencia, WAVs generados, cache de modelo y voice prompt cache fuera de Git.

items.title: El habla tecnica se prepara
items.body: TES prepara spoken text request-local antes de sintetizar: secretos se redactan, codigo y comandos siguen como texto, paths viran referencias utiles y terminos tecnicos mixtos quedan protegidos.

items.title: El audio vira evidencia
items.body: Los WAV generados vuelven las lecturas largas inspeccionables: pausar, repetir, comparar y diagnosticar si el problema vino de preparacion de texto, chunking, playback o pronunciacion del provider.

blocks.text: Usalo cuando la lectura importa: revisiones de diseno, notas largas de auditoria, cierres de release y prosa tecnica que mejora con una voz local de alta calidad. El setup vive en [TES-TTS-OMNIVOICE.md](install/TES-TTS-OMNIVOICE.md) y la seccion completa vive en el [manual](install/USER-MANUAL.html#tts-es).

pt.title: Agora a trilha tambem pode falar
pt.lede: `tes-tts` transforma trabalho tecnico em fala local e revisavel. Com OmniVoice opcional, o TES pode usar uma voz clonada local mantendo o provider fora do pacote e o runtime em estado local ignorado.

items.title: A voz continua opcional
items.body: TES nao embute OmniVoice nem exige fala cloud. O usuario opta, instala o provider localmente e mantem audio de referencia, WAVs gerados, cache de modelo e voice prompt cache fora do Git.

items.title: A fala tecnica e preparada
items.body: TES prepara spoken text request-local antes da sintese: segredos sao redigidos, codigo e comandos continuam texto, paths viram referencias uteis e termos tecnicos mistos ficam protegidos.

items.title: Audio vira evidencia
items.body: WAVs gerados tornam leituras longas inspecionaveis: pausar, repetir, comparar e diagnosticar se o problema veio da preparacao do texto, chunking, playback ou pronuncia do provider.

blocks.text: Use quando a leitura importa: reviews de design, notas longas de auditoria, fechamentos de release e prosa tecnica que melhora com uma voz local de alta qualidade. O setup vive em [TES-TTS-OMNIVOICE.md](install/TES-TTS-OMNIVOICE.md) e a secao completa vive no [manual](install/USER-MANUAL.html#tts-pt).

en.title: GitHub npx quickstart
en.lede: Installation is not the dream; it is the controlled path to the dream. Start with one GitHub package-spec command, then let the first agent session finish setup with evidence.

blocks.label: fixed ref form
blocks.text: npx --loglevel=error -y --package github:murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills#v0.3.147 tilly-engineer-skills add

blocks.label: bun runtime
blocks.text: bunx --silent --bun --package github:murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills#v0.3.147 tilly-engineer-skills add

blocks.label: non-interactive
blocks.text: npx --loglevel=error -y --package github:murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills#v0.3.147 tilly-engineer-skills add --agent all --yes

items: Run from the target repository with Node.js 18+ and npx, or Bun 1.0+ and bunx. TES also requires Python 3.11+ for local setup oracles.
Interactive mode lets you confirm target, agent hooks, and install mode before TES writes files.
Use `--agent all --yes` when you want Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor hooks plus their project MCP configs prepared non-interactively.
Codex: open Settings > Hooks, then Trust and enable the Session Start hook if it is marked needs review.
Claude Code: open or reopen Claude Code, wait for the TES completion notice, then run `/tes-setup`.
Cursor: reopen the workspace, let first-session setup complete, then run `/tes-setup` for the report.
Use `/tes-mcp` for explicit VS Code MCP registration or host-recognition repair.
After `/tes-setup` reports complete, run `/tes-align`, then use `/tes-map` for the current GPS view before starting project work.
Read the final report before approving commit, push, or rollout.

blocks.title: Important: agent follow-up is host-specific
blocks.text: The first run is not the same in every host. Codex: open Settings > Hooks, then Trust and enable Session Start if it is marked needs review. Claude Code: reopen Claude Code, wait for the TES completion notice, then run `/tes-setup`. Cursor: reopen the workspace, let first-session setup complete, then run `/tes-setup`. Only after the report is complete, run `/tes-align`, then use `/tes-map` for the current GPS view before project work.

`#v0.3.147` is the intended fixed-ref form. Treat the remote ref as certified only after the tag or fixed ref is authorized and `npm run release:check` passes; the current evidence is local package-source and bundle closure.

`--loglevel=error` keeps package-runner warnings out of the first-run screen while preserving real command failures. For Bun-only machines, use the `bunx --silent --bun` command. If neither runtime is installed, install Node.js LTS or Bun before running TES.

es.title: Quickstart con GitHub npx

blocks.label: ref fija
blocks.text: npx --loglevel=error -y --package github:murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills#v0.3.147 tilly-engineer-skills add

blocks.label: no interactivo
blocks.text: npx --loglevel=error -y --package github:murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills#v0.3.147 tilly-engineer-skills add --agent all --yes

items: Ejecuta desde el repositorio objetivo con Node.js 18+ y npx, o Bun 1.0+ y bunx. TES tambien requiere Python 3.11+ para los oraculos locales de setup.
El modo interactivo te deja confirmar target, hooks de agentes y modo de instalacion antes de escribir archivos.
Usa `--agent all --yes` cuando quieras preparar hooks y configs MCP de proyecto para Codex, Claude Code y Cursor de forma no interactiva.
Codex: abre Settings > Hooks, luego usa Trust y activa el hook Session Start si aparece como needs review.
Claude Code: abre o reabre Claude Code, espera el aviso de finalizacion de TES y ejecuta `/tes-setup`.
Cursor: reabre el workspace, deja que el setup de primera sesion termine y ejecuta `/tes-setup` para el reporte.
Usa `/tes-mcp` para registro MCP explicito de VS Code o reparacion de reconocimiento del host.
Despues de que `/tes-setup` reporte complete, ejecuta `/tes-align` y usa `/tes-map` para la vista GPS actual antes de empezar trabajo de proyecto.
Lee el reporte final antes de aprobar commit, push o rollout.

blocks.title: Importante: el seguimiento del agente depende del host
blocks.text: La primera ejecucion no es igual en todos los hosts. Codex: abre Settings > Hooks, luego usa Trust y activa Session Start si aparece como needs review. Claude Code: reabre Claude Code, espera el aviso de finalizacion de TES y ejecuta `/tes-setup`. Cursor: reabre el workspace, deja que el setup termine y ejecuta `/tes-setup`. Solo despues del reporte completo, ejecuta `/tes-align` y usa `/tes-map` para la vista GPS actual antes del trabajo de proyecto.

`#v0.3.147` es la forma de ref fija prevista. Trata el ref remoto como certificado solo despues de autorizar el tag o ref fijo y de que `npm run release:check` pase; la evidencia actual es cierre local de package-source y bundle.

`--loglevel=error` mantiene los avisos del package runner fuera de la primera pantalla sin ocultar fallas reales del comando. En maquinas solo con Bun, usa `bunx --silent --bun`. Si no hay runtime instalado, instala Node.js LTS o Bun antes de ejecutar TES.

O modo interativo deixa confirmar target, hooks de agentes e modo de instalacao antes de escrever arquivos.

blocks.title: Importante: o follow-up do agente depende do host
blocks.text: A primeira execucao nao e igual em todos os hosts. Codex: abra Settings > Hooks, depois use Trust e ative Session Start se aparecer como needs review. Claude Code: reabra o Claude Code, aguarde o aviso de conclusao do TES e rode `/tes-setup`. Cursor: reabra o workspace, deixe o setup terminar e rode `/tes-setup`. So depois do relatorio completo, rode `/tes-align` e use `/tes-map` para a visao GPS atual antes do trabalho no projeto.

`#v0.3.147` e a forma de ref fixa prevista. Trate o ref remoto como certificado somente depois de autorizar a tag ou ref fixo e de `npm run release:check` passar; a evidencia atual e fechamento local de package-source e bundle.

`--loglevel=error` mantem avisos do package runner fora da primeira tela sem esconder falhas reais do comando. Em maquinas somente com Bun, use `bunx --silent --bun`. Se nenhum runtime estiver instalado, instale Node.js LTS ou Bun antes de executar o TES.

en.title: Overview
en.lede: Tilly Engineer Skills installs a governance mesh for coding agents. Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor route through adapter-specific surfaces while project truth lives in versioned Markdown.

blocks.title: How you start
blocks.text: Required first-run path: `install -> hook -> /tes-setup -> /tes-align -> /tes-map`. Install from the target repository, open the agent, wait for the hook, run `/tes-setup`, run `/tes-align`, then use `/tes-map` for the current GPS view before project work. Use `/tes-update` for updates and `/tes-doctor` for repair.

blocks.title: Mantra Gate
blocks.text: When an agent is about to change state, TES uses Mantra Gate. Permitted actions show `[🍳 Flash-Fry]`; the full gate stays recorded, and missing records are reported as BYPASS_SUSPECTED.

blocks.title: What stays yours
blocks.text: Existing `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `CURSOR.md`, and Cursor rules are first backed up in `.tes/bk/<timestamp>/`. TES then installs a clean runtime and recovers useful local semantics into `docs/agents/**`.

blocks.title: Operator contract
blocks.text: This manual is for users installing, auditing, and rolling back TES. The agent-side contract lives in `docs/install/AGENT-MANUAL.md`.

es.title: Vista general
es.lede: Tilly Engineer Skills instala un mesh de gobernanza para agentes de codigo. Codex, Claude Code y Cursor pasan por superficies especificas mientras la verdad del proyecto vive en Markdown versionado.

blocks.title: Como empezar
blocks.text: Ruta obligatoria de primera ejecucion: `install -> hook -> /tes-setup -> /tes-align -> /tes-map`. Instala desde el repositorio objetivo, abre el agente, espera el hook, ejecuta `/tes-setup`, luego `/tes-align` y usa `/tes-map` para la vista GPS actual antes del trabajo de proyecto. Usa `/tes-update` para actualizar y `/tes-doctor` para reparar.

blocks.title: Mantra Gate
blocks.text: Cuando un agente esta por cambiar estado, TES usa Mantra Gate. Las acciones autorizadas muestran `[🍳 Flash-Fry]`; el gate completo queda registrado y la ausencia se reporta como BYPASS_SUSPECTED.

blocks.title: Lo que sigue siendo tuyo
blocks.text: Los archivos `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `CURSOR.md` y reglas de Cursor existentes se respaldan primero en `.tes/bk/<timestamp>/`. TES instala un runtime limpio y recupera semantica local util en `docs/agents/**`.

blocks.title: Contrato del operador
blocks.text: Este manual es para usuarios que instalan, auditan y revierten TES. El contrato del agente vive en `docs/install/AGENT-MANUAL.md`.

pt.title: Visao geral
pt.lede: Tilly Engineer Skills instala uma malha de governanca para agentes de codigo. Codex, Claude Code e Cursor passam por superficies especificas enquanto a verdade do projeto vive em Markdown versionado.

blocks.title: Como comecar
blocks.text: Caminho obrigatorio da primeira execucao: `install -> hook -> /tes-setup -> /tes-align -> /tes-map`. Instale a partir do repositorio alvo, abra o agente, aguarde o hook, rode `/tes-setup`, depois `/tes-align` e use `/tes-map` para a visao GPS atual antes do trabalho no projeto. Use `/tes-update` para atualizar e `/tes-doctor` para reparar.

blocks.title: Mantra Gate
blocks.text: Quando um agente esta prestes a mudar estado, o TES usa Mantra Gate. Acoes permitidas mostram `[🍳 Flash-Fry]`; o gate completo fica registrado e ausencia vira BYPASS_SUSPECTED.

blocks.title: O que continua sendo seu
blocks.text: Arquivos existentes como `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `CURSOR.md` e regras do Cursor sao primeiro salvos em `.tes/bk/<timestamp>/`. TES instala um runtime limpo e recupera semântica útil em `docs/agents/**`.

blocks.title: Contrato do operador
blocks.text: Este manual e para usuarios que instalam, auditam e revertem TES. O contrato do agente vive em `docs/install/AGENT-MANUAL.md`.

en.title: Quick install
en.lede: Start from the target repository with GitHub npx. The command installs TES locally, prepares selected agent hooks, and records the first-session setup path.

blocks.label: fixed ref form
blocks.text: npx --loglevel=error -y --package github:murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills#v0.3.147 tilly-engineer-skills add --agent all --yes

blocks.label: bun runtime
blocks.text: bunx --silent --bun --package github:murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills#v0.3.147 tilly-engineer-skills add --agent all --yes

items: Run the command from the target repository with Node.js 18+ or Bun 1.0+, plus Python 3.11+.
Interactive mode asks for target, agents, install mode, and final confirmation.
Codex: open Settings > Hooks, then Trust and enable the Session Start hook if it is marked needs review.
Claude Code: open or reopen Claude Code, wait for the TES completion notice, then run `/tes-setup`.
Cursor: reopen the workspace, let first-session setup complete, then run `/tes-setup` for the report.
The first-session hook starts setup, project context, and alignment gates once; repeated complete hooks exit quickly.
Please, run `/tes-setup` for the report before asking for commit or push.

blocks.title: Important: agent follow-up is host-specific
blocks.text: Do not start project work immediately after install. Codex needs hook review in Settings > Hooks when marked needs review; Claude Code needs the TES completion notice; Cursor needs a workspace reopen and `/tes-setup` report. Only after `/tes-setup` reports complete, run `/tes-align`, then use `/tes-map` for the current GPS view before project work.

Useful options: `--target <path>` installs outside the current directory; `--agent codex|claude|cursor|all` chooses hooks; `--yes` skips the wizard; `--dry-run` prints planned writes; `--mode preserve` is the default.

`#v0.3.147` is the intended fixed-ref form; remote certification is deferred until `release:check` passes after an authorized tag or ref. Runtime bundles stage under `.tes/setup/<version>/`; that directory is local cache, not project knowledge to commit.

Older plugin/root-skill surfaces (`skills/**`, `.claude-plugin/**`, `.agents/plugins/**`, and `plugins/tilly-engineer-skills/**`) are cleaned only when TES-owned, generated, or empty. Ambiguous or secret-like content is preserved, backed up in `.tes/bk/**`, and returned as `NEEDS_REVIEW`.

es.title: Instalacion rapida
es.lede: Empieza desde el repositorio objetivo con npx desde GitHub. El comando instala TES localmente, prepara los hooks de agentes seleccionados y registra el camino de setup de primera sesion.

blocks.label: ref fija
blocks.text: npx --loglevel=error -y --package github:murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills#v0.3.147 tilly-engineer-skills add --agent all --yes

blocks.label: runtime bun
blocks.text: bunx --silent --bun --package github:murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills#v0.3.147 tilly-engineer-skills add --agent all --yes

items: Ejecuta el comando desde el repositorio objetivo con Node.js 18+ o Bun 1.0+, mas Python 3.11+.
El modo interactivo pregunta target, agentes, modo de instalacion y confirmacion final.
Codex: abre Settings > Hooks, luego usa Trust y activa el hook Session Start si aparece como needs review.
Claude Code: abre o reabre Claude Code, espera el aviso de finalizacion de TES y ejecuta `/tes-setup`.
Cursor: reabre el workspace, deja que el setup de primera sesion termine y ejecuta `/tes-setup` para el reporte.
El hook de primera sesion inicia setup, contexto de proyecto y gates de alineacion una vez; los hooks completos repetidos salen rapido.
Lee el reporte final antes de pedir commit o push.

blocks.title: Importante: el seguimiento del agente depende del host
blocks.text: No empieces trabajo de proyecto inmediatamente despues de instalar. Codex necesita revisar el hook en Settings > Hooks cuando aparezca needs review; Claude Code necesita el aviso de finalizacion de TES; Cursor necesita reabrir el workspace y el reporte de `/tes-setup`. Solo despues de que `/tes-setup` reporte complete, ejecuta `/tes-align` y usa `/tes-map` para la vista GPS actual antes del trabajo de proyecto.

Opciones utiles: `--target <path>` instala fuera del directorio actual; `--agent codex|claude|cursor|all` elige hooks; `--yes` salta el wizard; `--dry-run` muestra escrituras planificadas; `--mode preserve` es el default.

`#v0.3.147` es la forma de ref fija prevista; la certificacion remota queda diferida hasta que `release:check` pase despues de un tag o ref autorizado. Los bundles runtime se preparan bajo `.tes/setup/<version>/`; ese directorio es cache local, no conocimiento del proyecto para commitear.

Las superficies antiguas de plugin/root skills (`skills/**`, `.claude-plugin/**`, `.agents/plugins/**` y `plugins/tilly-engineer-skills/**`) se limpian solo cuando son TES-owned, generadas o vacias. El contenido ambiguo o parecido a secreto se preserva, se respalda en `.tes/bk/**` y retorna `NEEDS_REVIEW`.

pt.title: Instalacao rapida
pt.lede: Comece pelo repositorio alvo com npx direto do GitHub. O comando instala TES localmente, prepara os hooks dos agentes escolhidos e registra o caminho de setup da primeira sessao.

blocks.label: ref fixa
blocks.text: npx --loglevel=error -y --package github:murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills#v0.3.147 tilly-engineer-skills add --agent all --yes

blocks.label: runtime bun

items: Rode o comando a partir do repositorio alvo com Node.js 18+ ou Bun 1.0+, mais Python 3.11+.
O modo interativo pergunta target, agentes, modo de instalacao e confirmacao final.
Codex: abra Settings > Hooks, depois use Trust e ative o hook Session Start se ele aparecer como needs review.
Claude Code: abra ou reabra o Claude Code, aguarde o aviso de conclusao do TES e rode `/tes-setup`.
Cursor: reabra o workspace, deixe o setup de primeira sessao terminar e rode `/tes-setup` para o relatorio.
O hook de primeira sessao inicia setup, contexto do projeto e gates de alinhamento uma vez; hooks completos repetidos saem rapido.
Leia o relatorio final antes de pedir commit ou push.

blocks.title: Importante: o follow-up do agente depende do host
blocks.text: Nao inicie trabalho no projeto imediatamente depois de instalar. Codex precisa revisar o hook em Settings > Hooks quando aparecer needs review; Claude Code precisa do aviso de conclusao do TES; Cursor precisa reabrir o workspace e ver o relatorio de `/tes-setup`. So depois que `/tes-setup` reportar complete, rode `/tes-align` e use `/tes-map` para a visao GPS atual antes do trabalho no projeto.

Opcoes uteis: `--target <path>` instala fora do diretorio atual; `--agent codex|claude|cursor|all` escolhe hooks; `--yes` pula o wizard; `--dry-run` mostra escritas planejadas; `--mode preserve` e o default.

`#v0.3.147` e a forma de ref fixa prevista; a certificacao remota fica deferida ate `release:check` passar depois de uma tag ou ref autorizado. Bundles runtime sao preparados em `.tes/setup/<version>/`; esse diretorio e cache local, nao conhecimento do projeto para commit.

Superficies antigas de plugin/root skills (`skills/**`, `.claude-plugin/**`, `.agents/plugins/**` e `plugins/tilly-engineer-skills/**`) sao limpas somente quando sao TES-owned, geradas ou vazias. Conteudo ambiguo ou com sinal de segredo e preservado, salvo em `.tes/bk/**` e retorna `NEEDS_REVIEW`.

en.title: Optional voice: tes-tts with OmniVoice
en.lede: `tes-tts` can read technical work aloud. When you want a stronger local cloned voice, install OmniVoice as an optional provider; TES keeps it outside the package and inside a local ignored runtime.

blocks.title: What is optional
blocks.text: TES installs without OmniVoice. OmniVoice is chosen by the user, installed in a local Python environment, and used only when `/tes-tts` or a read-aloud request explicitly asks for speech.

blocks.label: local runtime
blocks.text: .tes/runtime/tes-tts/omnivoice/

items: Create a fresh Python 3.11 virtual environment under `.tes/runtime/tes-tts/omnivoice/venv`.
Install PyTorch for your hardware first, then install OmniVoice from PyPI or the upstream GitHub source.
Normalize or place the reference WAV at `.tes/runtime/tes-tts/omnivoice/refs/audio-modelo-clone-mono24k.wav`.
Create the `tes-tts-local-clone` voice profile metadata with the reference audio path and faithful reference transcript.
Run `python3 scripts/tes_tts_omnivoice_provider.py status`, then `warm-cache`, then `warm-cache --dry-run` to verify the protected prompt cache exists.
Use `speak` for short reads and `speak-long --combine --first-audio-buffered` for longer material that needs replayable WAV output.

rows: User-controlled; not part of normal TES install.
`.tes/runtime/**`; ignored by Git and safe for local cache.
Protected local state; not a committed artifact.
Legacy lab compatibility, not the product path.
Local review evidence under ignored runtime folders unless the user chooses otherwise.

blocks.text: Detailed setup, commands, cache policy, and troubleshooting live in [TES-TTS-OMNIVOICE.md](TES-TTS-OMNIVOICE.md). Follow upstream OmniVoice documentation for hardware-specific PyTorch wheels and provider changes.

Responsible use is part of the contract: clone only voices you own or are authorized to use. TES still redacts secrets before speech, treats commands and code as text, avoids proactive speech, and never summarizes user text unless asked.

es.title: Voz opcional: tes-tts con OmniVoice
es.lede: `tes-tts` puede leer trabajo tecnico en voz alta. Cuando necesitas una voz local clonada mas fuerte, instala OmniVoice como proveedor opcional; TES lo mantiene fuera del paquete y dentro de un runtime local ignorado.

blocks.title: Que es opcional
blocks.text: TES se instala sin OmniVoice. OmniVoice lo elige el usuario, se instala en un entorno Python local y se usa solo cuando `/tes-tts` o una solicitud de lectura pide voz explicitamente.

blocks.label: runtime local
blocks.text: .tes/runtime/tes-tts/omnivoice/

items: Crea un virtualenv Python 3.11 limpio en `.tes/runtime/tes-tts/omnivoice/venv`.
Instala PyTorch para tu hardware primero, luego instala OmniVoice desde PyPI o desde el source GitHub upstream.
Normaliza o coloca el WAV de referencia en `.tes/runtime/tes-tts/omnivoice/refs/audio-modelo-clone-mono24k.wav`.
Crea la metadata del perfil `tes-tts-local-clone` con la ruta del audio de referencia y la transcripcion fiel.
Ejecuta `python3 scripts/tes_tts_omnivoice_provider.py status`, luego `warm-cache`, y despues `warm-cache --dry-run` para verificar que el cache protegido existe.
Usa `speak` para lecturas cortas y `speak-long --combine --first-audio-buffered` para material largo que necesita WAV reproducible.

rows: Controlada por el usuario; no forma parte de la instalacion normal de TES.
`.tes/runtime/**`; ignorada por Git y segura para cache local.
Estado local protegido; no es artefacto commiteado.
Compatibilidad legacy de lab, no el camino de producto.
Evidencia local de revision bajo carpetas runtime ignoradas salvo decision del usuario.

blocks.text: El setup detallado, comandos, politica de cache y troubleshooting viven en [TES-TTS-OMNIVOICE.md](TES-TTS-OMNIVOICE.md). Sigue la documentacion upstream de OmniVoice para wheels PyTorch especificos de hardware y cambios del proveedor.

El uso responsable es parte del contrato: clona solo voces propias o autorizadas. TES sigue redactando secretos antes de hablar, trata comandos y codigo como texto, evita habla proactiva y nunca resume texto del usuario salvo pedido explicito.

pt.title: Voz opcional: tes-tts com OmniVoice
pt.lede: `tes-tts` pode ler trabalho tecnico em voz alta. Quando voce quiser uma voz local clonada mais forte, instale OmniVoice como provider opcional; o TES mantem isso fora do pacote e dentro de um runtime local ignorado.

blocks.title: O que e opcional
blocks.text: TES instala sem OmniVoice. OmniVoice e escolhido pelo usuario, instalado em um ambiente Python local e usado apenas quando `/tes-tts` ou um pedido de leitura pedir fala explicitamente.

blocks.label: runtime local
blocks.text: .tes/runtime/tes-tts/omnivoice/

items: Crie um virtualenv Python 3.11 limpo em `.tes/runtime/tes-tts/omnivoice/venv`.
Instale PyTorch para seu hardware primeiro, depois instale OmniVoice pelo PyPI ou pelo source GitHub upstream.
Normalize ou posicione o WAV de referencia em `.tes/runtime/tes-tts/omnivoice/refs/audio-modelo-clone-mono24k.wav`.
Crie a metadata do perfil `tes-tts-local-clone` com o caminho do audio de referencia e a transcricao fiel.
Rode `python3 scripts/tes_tts_omnivoice_provider.py status`, depois `warm-cache`, e depois `warm-cache --dry-run` para verificar que o cache protegido existe.
Use `speak` para leituras curtas e `speak-long --combine --first-audio-buffered` para material longo que precisa de WAV reproduzivel.

en.title: Safety boundaries
en.lede: TES is local and inspectable by default. It refuses broad release, remote, and marketplace behavior unless explicitly authorized.

items: No push, publish, tag, amend, remote change, dependency install, or marketplace action by default.
No `.obsidian/**` writes. Obsidian is optional viewing over Markdown.
No code, diffs, agent inputs, file contents, secrets, personal data, absolute paths, raw stack traces, branch names, or remote URLs in Field Reports.
The Root context gate uses `root_context.py` to inspect `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `.cursor/rules/**`, and `docs/agents/**` before overwrite or recovery.

blocks.text: Update checks compare installed and cloud versions, helper contract parity, `runtime_trigger_status`, `recommended_route`, `recommended_update_scope`, `legacy_retirement_required`, and `self_test_mode`. A clean no-op reports `update_available=False`, `recommended_update_scope=none`, `helper_contract_status=PASS`, and a final Field Reports `tes_update` event when reporting is enabled. `STALE_HELPERS` blocks adapter-config until helper repair is complete.

en.title: Cortex
en.lede: Cortex is filesystem-first memory. Markdown is the contract; SQLite recall is a derived access path.

blocks.text: Cortex lives under `docs/agents/cortex/**`. Every durable claim needs evidence. Operator commands classify mutability: `health`, `peek`, and `review` are read-only; `checkpoint` writes only TTL resume state; `remember` requires authorization and evidence; `forget` is blocked until consolidation evidence exists.
You can read Cortex like any repository document, review it in pull requests, and revert it with Git.

Puedes leer Cortex como cualquier documento del repositorio, revisarlo en pull requests y revertirlo con Git.

pt.title: Obsidian
pt.lede: Obsidian e uma bancada visual opcional sobre Markdown. Nao e dependencia de runtime nem prova por si so.

items: Abra `docs/agents/` como vault para a malha completa.
Abra `docs/agents/cortex/` para trabalho focado de memoria.
Mantenha links Markdown legiveis fora do Obsidian e evite prova que so existe no Obsidian.

en.title: Final report
en.lede: The final report is the user-facing contract. Read it before approving commit or push.

blocks.text: It records status, source snapshot freshness, `source_package_commit`, `source_remote_head`, `source_freshness`, `STALE_SOURCE`, Current public bundles, the installed helper set, Field Reports state, root context gate, changed files, rollback summary, and whether the run was certified against the recorded snapshot.
Important statuses include `RECOVERED`, `NEEDS_REVIEW`, `BLOCKED`, `DEGRADED`, `PASS`, and `STALE_SOURCE`. A backup under `.tes/bk/<timestamp>` is rollback evidence, not a new TES surface.

es.title: Reporte final
es.lede: El reporte final es el contrato visible para el usuario. Leelo antes de aprobar commit o push.

blocks.text: Registra estado, source snapshot freshness, `source_package_commit`, `source_remote_head`, `source_freshness`, `STALE_SOURCE`, Current public bundles, installed helper set, Field Reports state, root context gate, archivos cambiados, rollback summary y si el run fue certified against the recorded snapshot.
Estados importantes: `RECOVERED`, `NEEDS_REVIEW`, `BLOCKED`, `DEGRADED`, `PASS` y `STALE_SOURCE`. Un backup en `.tes/bk/<timestamp>` es evidencia de rollback, no una nueva superficie TES.

pt.title: Relatorio final
pt.lede: O relatorio final e o contrato visivel para o usuario. Leia antes de aprovar commit ou push.

blocks.text: Ele registra status, frescor do snapshot fonte, `source_package_commit`, `source_remote_head`, `source_freshness`, `STALE_SOURCE`, Current public bundles, helper set instalado, estado do Field Reports, gate de contexto raiz, arquivos alterados, resumo de rollback e se o run foi certificado contra o snapshot registrado.
Estados importantes incluem `RECOVERED`, `NEEDS_REVIEW`, `BLOCKED`, `DEGRADED`, `PASS` e `STALE_SOURCE`. Um backup em `.tes/bk/<timestamp>` e evidencia de rollback, nao uma nova superficie TES.

en.title: Rollback
en.lede: Rollback should be boring. TES tells you the baseline and the installer-created files so you can undo the run with Git.

blocks.label: rollback
blocks.text:
git reset --hard <baseline-head>
git clean -fd -- .tes/setup/<version>
Do not reset blindly if unrelated user work exists. Ask the agent to explain the changed-file inventory and the clean backup first.

es.title: Rollback
es.lede: Rollback debe ser aburrido. TES informa el baseline y los archivos creados por el instalador para que puedas deshacer con Git.

blocks.label: rollback
blocks.text:
git reset --hard <baseline-head>
git clean -fd -- .tes/setup/<version>
No hagas reset a ciegas si existe trabajo no relacionado. Pide al agente el inventario de cambios y el clean backup primero.

pt.title: Rollback
pt.lede: Rollback deve ser entediante. TES informa o baseline e os arquivos criados pelo instalador para voce desfazer com Git.

blocks.label: rollback
blocks.text:
git reset --hard <baseline-head>
git clean -fd -- .tes/setup/<version>
Nao faca reset as cegas se houver trabalho de usuario nao relacionado. Peca ao agente o inventario de arquivos alterados e o clean backup primeiro.
